message:
🐛 Fix OAuth callback URL using localhost in deployed mode (#842)

In production, backend and frontend are served from the same origin
behind an OpenShift route. Use FrontendURL for OAuth redirect instead
of hardcoded localhost.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
